23:36:40falsesys_hub_action_type_definition7bbd1d238384c310982eba29feaad3802sys_variable_valueadmin2026-04-10 17:02:39b53e5da38384c310982eba29feaad3400admin2026-04-10 17:02:390293e5da38384c310982eba29feaad331sys_hub_action_type_definition7bbd1d238384c310982eba29feaad3801sys_variable_valueadmin2026-04-10 17:02:39f93e5da38384c310982eba29feaad3400admin2026-04-10 17:02:39{"version":"1.0","complexObject":{"code":{"$cv":{"$c":"java.lang.String","$v":""}},"message":{"$cv":{"$c":"java.lang.String","$v":""}}},"complexObjectSchema":{"FlowDesigner:FDACTIONSTATUS":{"code":"Integer","code.$field_facets":{"SimpleMapFacet":"{\"uiTypeLabel\":\"Integer\",\"read_only\":\"false\",\"hint\":\"\",\"uiType\":\"integer\",\"default_value\":\"\",\"label\":\"Code\",\"action_error_output\":\"true\",\"mandatory\":\"false\",\"order\":\"1\",\"max_length\":\"40\"}"},"message":"String","message.$field_facets":{"SimpleMapFacet":"{\"uiTypeLabel\":\"String\",\"read_only\":\"false\",\"hint\":\"\",\"uiType\":\"string\",\"default_value\":\"\",\"label\":\"Message\",\"action_error_output\":\"true\",\"mandatory\":\"false\",\"order\":\"2\",\"max_length\":\"4000\"}"}},"FlowDesigner:FDACTIONSTATUS.$type_facets":{"SimpleMapFacet":"{\"default_value\":\"\",\"label\":\"Action Status\",\"action_error_output\":\"true\",\"mandatory\":\"false\",\"uiUniqueId\":\"4adfb7bc-9d67-498d-88d0-8d6c3d584fed\",\"uiTypeLabel\":\"Object\",\"co_type_name\":\"FDACTIONSTATUS\",\"element_mapping_provider\":\"com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper\",\"read_only\":\"false\",\"hint\":null,\"uiType\":\"object\",\"order\":\"1\",\"max_length\":\"65000\"}"}},"serializationFormat":"JSON"}293e5da38384c310982eba29feaad32a7bbd1d238384c310982eba29feaad380cee0fa9d-f2fd-436b-8e13-6659b12c067c11
106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7admin2026-04-10 17:02:39a93e5da38384c310982eba29feaad30c4globaladmin2026-04-10 21:13:52sys_hub_step_instancea93e5da38384c310982eba29feaad30c400sys_variable_valueadmin2026-04-10 17:02:39a93e5da38384c310982eba29feaad3240admin2026-04-10 17:02:3935aa573fd7802200bdbaee5b5e610375f5e56d79b3101300176b051a16a8dce4sys_hub_step_instancea93e5da38384c310982eba29feaad30c600sys_variable_valueadmin2026-04-10 17:02:39ed3e5da38384c310982eba29feaad3243admin2026-04-10 21:13:52(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var inc = new GlideRecord("incident"); if (!inc.get(inputs.current.sys_id)) { return; } var content = ""; // ================= INCIDENT ================= content += "INCIDENT\n"; content += "Number,Description,State,Priority\n"; content += inc.number + "," + inc.short_description + "," + inc.getDisplayValue("state") + "," + inc.getDisplayValue("priority") + "\n\n"; // ================= CHANGES ================= content += "CHANGES\n"; content += "Number,Short Description,State\n"; var chg = new GlideRecord("change_request"); chg.addQuery("parent", inc.sys_id); chg.query(); while (chg.next()) { content += chg.number + "," + chg.short_description + "," + chg.getDisplayValue("state") + "\n"; } content += "\n"; // ================= PROBLEMS ================= content += "PROBLEMS\n"; content += "Number,Description,State\n"; var prb = new GlideRecord("problem"); prb.addQuery("cmdb_ci", inc.cmdb_ci); prb.query(); while (prb.next()) { content += prb.number + "," + prb.short_description + "," + prb.getDisplayValue("state") + "\n"; } content += "\n"; // ================= INTERACTIONS ================= content += "INTERACTIONS\n"; content += "Number,Short Description,State\n"; var interaction = new GlideRecord("interaction"); interaction.addQuery("parent", inc.sys_id); interaction.query(); while (interaction.next()) { content += interaction.number + "," + interaction.short_description + "," + interaction.getDisplayValue("state") + "\n"; } // ================= ATTACH FILE ================= var gsa = new GlideSysAttachment(); gsa.write( inc, "incident_export.csv", "text/csv", content ); })(inputs, outputs);71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719bapplicationa93e5da38384c310982eba29feaad30cadmin2026-04-10 17:02:39a13e5da38384c310982eba29feaad3240admin2026-04-10 17:02:39var__m_sys_flow_step_definition_input_106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7

if (!inc.get(inputs.current.sys_id)) { return; } var content = ""; // ================= INCIDENT ================= content += "INCIDENT\n"; content += "Number,Description,State,Priority\n"; content += inc.number + "," + inc.short_description + "," + inc.getDisplayValue("state") + "," + inc.getDisplayValue("priority") + "\n\n"; // ================= CHANGES ================= content += "CHANGES\n"; content += "Number,Short Description,State\n"; var chg = new GlideRecord("change_request"); chg.addQuery("parent", inc.sys_id); chg.query(); while (chg.next()) { content += chg.number + "," + chg.short_description + "," + chg.getDisplayValue("state") + "\n"; } content += "\n"; // ================= PROBLEMS ================= content += "PROBLEMS\n"; content += "Number,Description,State\n"; var prb = new GlideRecord("problem"); prb.addQuery("cmdb_ci", inc.cmdb_ci); prb.query(); while (prb.next()) { content += prb.number + "," + prb.short_description + "," + prb.getDisplayValue("state") + "\n"; interaction.query(); while (interaction.next()) { content += interaction.number + "," + interaction.short_description + "," + interaction.getDisplayValue("state") + "\n"; } // ================= ATTACH FILE ================= var gsa = new GlideSysAttachment(); gsa.write( inc, "incident_export.csv", "text/csv", content ); })(inputs, outputs);71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719bapplication45d9e52b83c4c310982eba29feaad3a0admin2026-04-10 17:53:2545d9e52b83c4c310982eba29feaad3b60admin2026-04-10 17:53:25var__m_sys_flow_step_definition_input_106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7
